hero.desc: CareLink connects families with verified caregivers and trusted specialists — all in one platform, anywhere in the world.

howItWorks.title: Simple. Fast. Trusted.
howItWorks.desc: Three steps to connect with the right care professional in your area.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe the care you need — daily assistance, medical support, or specialist advice.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We match you with verified professionals nearby based on qualifications and reviews.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Confirm your booking and pay securely. Funds are released only after service is complete.

services.title: One Platform, Every Care Need
services.desc: From daily caregiving to complex estate matters — CareLink covers the full journey.

care.title: Caregiver Matching
care.desc: Find certified caregivers for your loved ones. Background-checked, reviewed, and ready to help.

estate.title: Estate & Inheritance
estate.desc: Connect with trusted attorneys, tax advisors, and estate planners for professional guidance.

cta.title: Ready to Find the Right Care?
cta.desc: Join thousands of families and caregivers already on CareLink.
